requirement_topic.en: Wireless-radio scope and MCMC registration for smart refrigeration models
requirement_topic.zh: 无线/智能功能与MCMC注册范围
requirement_topic.zht: 無線/智能功能與MCMC註冊範圍

summary.en: Malaysia expects telecom-radio review when a model includes intentional radio functions such as Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cordless operation, or remote control modules. Standard mechanical refrigerators without active RF modules are handled primarily under electrical safety and energy requirements, while connected models require early scope confirmation with the Malaysian telecom authority pathway.
summary.zh: 马来西亚对包含主动无线功能（如Wi-Fi、蓝牙、遥控）的机型要求先确认其无线电器材处理路径。普通不含主动射频模块的机械冰箱以电气安全和能效路径为主，但有联网模块的型号通常需走MCMC相关范围确认。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞對包含主動無線功能（如Wi-Fi、藍牙、遙控）之型號要求先確認其無線電器材處理路徑。普通不含主動射頻模組的機械冰箱以電氣安全與能效路徑為主，但有連網模組的型號通常需走MCMC相關範圍確認。

standards_or_laws: MCMC framework for equipment using wireless communication in Malaysia
National telecommunications and radio compliance pathway for active RF functions

summary.en: China non-smart refrigerators rely on GB 4706.13 safety and related EMC coverage when required. When products include built-in communication modules in China, compliance is generally handled within China domestic product-file workflows and is not identical to Malaysia telecom-authority scope.
summary.zh: 中国非联网冰箱通常遵循GB 4706.13及相关EMC条款。若产品含智能模组，中国也可按国内通信与产品流程提交，但该流程与马来西亚MCMC无线电范围判定并不等同。
summary.zht: 中國非聯網冰箱通常遵循GB 4706.13及相關EMC條款。若產品含智能模組，中國亦可按國內通信與產品流程提交，但該流程與馬來西亞MCMC無線電範圍判定並不等同。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Household electric refrigerators safety baseline in China
GB 4343.1 (EMC framework in scope where applicable in China)

gap.en: The practical gap is jurisdictional scope, not simply technical parameters. Exporters need a model-by-model statement of wireless functionality and clear evidence routing to the correct Malaysian telecom pathway if connectivity is embedded, while keeping the non-radio versions aligned with electrical and energy evidence only.
gap.zh: 实际差距主要是监管辖域判定而非单一技术参数。出口商应按机型逐条确认是否具备无线功能，并对接到马来西亚正确的无线电路径；无RF模块版本则按电气和能效证据处理，避免以中国文件代替马来西亚分类。
gap.zht: 實際差距主要是監管管轄範圍判定而非單一技術參數。出口商應按機型逐條確認是否具備無線功能，並對接到馬來西亞正確的無線電路徑；無RF模組版本則按電氣與能效證據處理，避免以中國文件取代馬來西亞分類。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional. Mandatory telecom registration pathway applies when the refrigerator has active wireless transmit/receive functions. Non-radio variants are generally not governed by telecom-only registration in the same way.
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional. China CCC and GB/T baselines apply to the corresponding domestic safety and EMC scope but do not determine the Malaysia telecom path.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Exporters should classify each refrigerator SKU before final filing. Connected models may trigger telecom and radio handling in Malaysia, while non-connected models should keep their compliance focus on ST, SIRIM, and MEPS. Avoid using Chinese GB/T telecom assumptions as destination proof.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口商应在提交前逐SKU判定型号属性。带联网功能的机型可能触发马来西亚无线电处理，而非联网版本主要按ST、SIRIM与MEPS合规。不要把中国的GB/T无线假设直接当作马来西亚目的地依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口商應在提交前逐SKU判定機型屬性。帶聯網功能的機型可能觸發馬來西亞無線電處理，而非聯網版本主要按ST、SIRIM與MEPS合規。不要將中國GB/T無線假設直接當作馬來西亞目的地依據。
